atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports an annual exam and review of current medications and conditions.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Martha reports traveling a lot recently.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Martha reports feeling safer about traveling.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Martha reports hiking in the Northern Cascades.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Martha reports doing well with a low sodium diet.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Martha reports taking her blood pressure medications as directed.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Martha admits to occasionally forgetting to take her blood pressure medications.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports feeling depressed.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports no feelings of wanting to harm herself or hurt others.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports nasal congestion from fall pollen and allergies.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies chest pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies shortness of breath.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies nausea.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies vomiting.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician finds the patient's blood pressure elevated.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: A three out of six systolic ejection murmur is heard on the heart exam.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: One plus pitting edema is noted in the lower extremities.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The echocardiogram showed that the patient has low-ish pumping function of the heart at about 45%.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The lipid panel from last year showed that the patient's cholesterol was slightly high.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports nasal congestion.
